hooks.command: sh -c 'for root in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" . "__PLUGIN_DIR__"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/hooks/runweave-hook-dispatch.cjs" ]; then exec node "$root/hooks/runweave-hook-dispatch.cjs"; fi; done; exit 0'
